description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure features a large main building with expansive glass windows along the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. Adjacent to the main building is a smaller, detached structure, likely serving as a garage or auxiliary space, connected by a paved area. A spacious swimming pool is situated in the courtyard, bordered by clean, geometric landscaping. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with a combination of concrete, glass, and metal elements. The overall design emphasizes open space, simplicity, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows, a detached auxiliary structure, and a spacious courtyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building with large windows, the detached auxiliary structure, and the pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building, the pool, and the proximity of the auxiliary structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, the pool area, and the auxiliary structure on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the auxiliary structure, the pool, and the side of the main building.
